name: VTBattle-VTubers aren't about the number of subscribers! It's about power!
short_description: VTuber Battle: It’s Not About Subscribers! It’s All About Power! is a card game combined with auto-battle mechanics! You can use over 100 VTubers as protagonists. Make your favorite VTuber the hero! Win battles, acquire even stronger cards, and aim to become the strongest!
detailed_description:
📅 Tuesday, September 16, 2025
A New Update Has Arrived: Card Pack Vol.9 “Omochi Chronicle” Now Available!
From soothing voices to chaotic blades—VTBattle: It’s Not About Subscribers—Decide It with Strength! brings another exciting expansion to the battlefield!

This update adds 35 new VTubers, pushing the total roster to over 300 unique creators. And who knows—you might even encounter a hidden character!?

🆕 What's New in Vol.9 “Omochi Chronicle”

  • 🌟 35 new VTubers join the fray

  • ⚔️ New card type: Chaos Edge

  • 🧠 35 brand-new skills added to the system

🎀 Choose From Over 300 VTubers!

Whether they’re streamers, singers, illustrators, or ASMR talents, every single VTuber is fully playable as your main character.
Who will you bring to the battlefield?

📦 Build Your Collection!

Over 100 playable VTubers, each with multiple cards of varying rarities.
Strengthen your favorite creator’s deck and complete their collection!

🎮 Strategic Card Game Meets Auto-Battle

Create a team of five cards to boost your stats—HP, ATK, DEF, MAG, MDEF, SPD—and challenge tougher opponents as you climb the ranks!

  • Every run feels different with roguelike elements

  • Outwit your opponents with strategic builds

  • Choose from a wide variety of card effects and abilities

💡 Every Card Can Be a Hero

The strength of a card depends on its rarity, level, and synergy, not just the character.
Even low-rarity cards can become essential in the right build—every card matters.

⏱ Estimated Playtime

A single run takes 1–2 hours, perfect for both casual sessions and intense theorycrafting.

📺 Streaming Guidelines

✅ Monetization is allowed
✅ All scenes can be streamed
✅ VTBattle may be featured in full in videos or live streams

📝 Note:
Please be respectful to all participating VTubers. This game features real creators, and we ask for your support and kindness in your content.

Let us know who your favorite character is—and stay tuned for upcoming battle features and online modes in future updates!
